column8: Nick thought that his father (not to come) home yet.
column9: Mary (to tell) us that she had cooked a good dinner.
column10: Yesterday I found the book which I (to lose) in summer.
column11: When we (to come) to the station, the train had already left.
column12: David was irritated because the police inspector (to ask) him questions for more than an hour.
column13: She (to work) as a shop-assistant for ten years in this shop.
column14: Anthony (wait) for his airplane for 3 hours when its delay was announced.
column15: I (to have) breakfast before I went to school.
